initiatives.name: Food Not Bombs West Palm Beach
initiatives.description: A volunteer-run mutual aid collective sharing free vegan and vegetarian meals in West Palm Beach. They coordinate food recovery and distribution while building community power through direct action, resource sharing, and solidarity networks to address food insecurity and waste.

initiatives.name: EMA WPB
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in West Palm Beach. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective care and support.

initiatives.name: Radical Eldub
initiatives.description: A grassroots collective fostering mutual aid and community power through direct support and radical organizing in Palm Beach. They coordinate resource sharing, political education, and solidarity networks while building power through community defense, collective care, and creating spaces for movement building and resistance.

initiatives.name: EMA Abortion Fund
initiatives.description: We serve the Palm Beaches & Treasure Coast. Get help paying for your abortions!

initiatives.name: Mask Bloc Palm Beach
initiatives.description: Distributing free high quality masks in Palm Beach County, FL
